headline.purpose: Section h2 titles (Leistungen, Über uns, Referenzen, process section).

label.purpose: Eyebrows, service tags, mini-headers — reserved for measured/counted/tagged content.

motion.name: logomark-sway
motion.value: translateY(0 -> 6px), 4.6s ease-in-out infinite, staggered per chevron
motion.purpose: Continuous ambient sway on the three logo chevrons, echoing material flow through a silo.

motion.name: logomark-flow
motion.value: stroke-dashoffset 100 -> 0, 3.4s linear infinite, staggered per chevron
motion.purpose: Light-pulse flowing through each logo chevron.

motion.name: flow-motif
motion.purpose: Decorative flowing-line motif (FlowMotif.astro) used as a section accent.

motion.name: color-transition
motion.purpose: Hover/focus state changes on buttons and nav links; no transform or shadow accompanies it.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single solid-fill CTA button, used for 'Kostenloses Erstgespräch vereinbaren' and its repeats.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: #8f4523; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 2px; padding: 14px 24px; font-family: 'Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { background: #7a3a1d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #183a59; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: #183a59; border: 1px solid #a9b7c4; border-radius: 2px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover, .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { border-color: #183a59; }

components.name: Hairline Stat Cell
components.description: One cell in the hero's ruled stat grid — cells share hairline borders instead of being individually boxed.
components.html:
100–980 t
Silo-Kapazität, individuell geplant
15.000 l/h
Löseleistung der Soleaufbereitung
components.css: .ds-stat-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: rgba(24,58,89,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(24,58,89,0.12); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-stat-cell { background: #fbfcfc; padding: 24px 20px; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: 'Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #183a59; } .ds-stat-label { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4; color: #526376; }

components.name: Divided List
components.description: The system's default 'collection of things' pattern: hairline dividers between entries, no card backgrounds.
components.html:
• Planung und Montage von GFK- und Edelstahlsilos
  • Bau von Soleaufbereitungsanlagen und Soletankanlagen
  • Wartung, Service und Störungsnotdienst bestehender Anlagen
components.css: .ds-divided-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-divided-item { display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(24,58,89,0.12); font-family: 'Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #526376; } .ds-divided-item:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 0; } .ds-divided-item::before { content: ''; flex: none; width: 6px; height: 6px; margin-top: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #b15a2e; }

components.name: Header Nav
components.description: Fixed, translucent, blurred header with nav links and a repeated primary CTA.
components.html:
SG Technik GmbH
Über unsLeistungen
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 20px 24px; background: rgba(13,36,54,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-header-logo { font-family: 'Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #f5f7f8; } .ds-header-nav { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #a9b7c4; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { color: #f5f7f8; }

narrative.overview: This system reads like a technical drawing, not a marketing page. Every surface is flat — there is no shadow anywhere in the codebase. Structure comes from hairline rules (border-line, a 12%-opacity navy) that divide content the way a drawing separates one detail from the next, and from mono, tabular-numeral readouts (stat values, process-step numbers) that behave like instrument labels rather than decoration. The palette is a deep navy-to-copper range pulled directly from the company's logo mark: navy for authority and ink, copper as the single, deliberately rare accent that marks calls to action and enumerated tags. Nothing here performs — it demonstrates. Per PRODUCT.md, the system explicitly rejects the flashy startup/SaaS look (no gradients, no glassmorphism, no hero-metric-dashboard clichés), the generic corporate-stock-photo site, and anything that reads cheap or DIY. It should feel like it was engineered by the same people who engineer the silos.
keyCharacteristics: Flat by construction — zero box-shadow declarations anywhere in the codebase.
Dividers, not containers — sections separate content with 1px hairline rules and background zebra-striping, never with cards.
Mono tabular numerals for anything measured or sequenced (stats, process steps).
One accent color (copper), used sparingly: primary CTA, tag labels, bullet marks, small dashes.
Self-hosted IBM Plex Sans/Mono throughout; no external font requests.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Copper appears only as a mark, a dash, a bullet, or a CTA fill — never as a section background or a large shape. If copper is covering more than a button or a hairline, it's wrong.

rules.name: The Hairline-Not-Gray Rule
rules.body: Every divider and border on this site is line (rgba(24, 58, 89, 0.12)), a translucent tint of navy — never a flat neutral gray like #e5e5e5.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Measured Rule
rules.body: Plex Mono is reserved for numbers and labels that represent something counted, sequenced, or tagged — never for narrative prose.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Never add box-shadow to convey elevation. Depth is expressed with hairline dividers and background contrast only.

rules.name: The No-Card Rule
rules.body: Any new 'collection of things' component should default to a hairline-divided grid or list, never a set of individually-boxed cards.

dos: Do keep every divider and border as line (rgba(24, 58, 89, 0.12)), never a flat gray.
Do use hairline-divided grids/lists for any new collection of items — stats, steps, references, features.
Do reserve copper for CTAs, tags, bullets, and small marks — never a section background.
Do use Plex Mono only for numbers, tags, and uppercase labels; Plex Sans for everything else.
Do keep motion purposeful and rare: the logo sway/flow and the FlowMotif dash animation are the only continuous animations on the site, and both already respect prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't introduce box-shadow anywhere — this system has none, by the Named No-Shadow Rule.
Don't wrap content in cards. Per PRODUCT.md's anti-references and the No-Card Rule, boxed/shadowed containers read as generic-corporate or SaaS-template, which this brand explicitly rejects.
Don't use gradients, glassmorphism, or a hero-metric-dashboard layout — PRODUCT.md names these directly as what the site should not look like.
Don't use stock photography or generic corporate imagery; the site currently ships with no photography at all, relying on typography, the logo mark, and named/measured proof instead.
Don't let copper cover more than a button, a tag, or a hairline mark — if it's filling a large surface, that violates the One Accent Rule.
